sql_array: CREATE TABLE complex_entropy (`id` UInt32, `value` Float64, `string_value` String, `nullable_value` Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT entropy(value) AS entropy_val, COUNT(*) AS count FROM complex_entropy GROUP BY string_value HAVING count > 1 AND entropy(value) > 0.0;
CREATE TABLE temp_join (`join_id` UInt32, `foreign_id` UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;

SELECT a.id, entropy(a.value) FROM complex_entropy a JOIN temp_join b ON a.id = b.foreign_id WHERE a.value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM complex_entropy) AND a.nullable_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.id HAVING entropy(a.value) > 0.0 ORDER BY a.id;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM complex_entropy WHERE string_value IN (SELECT string_value FROM complex_entropy WHERE entropy(value) > 0.5) AND nullable_value IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE boundary_values (`num` Int32, `str_value` String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO boundary_values VALUES (2147483647, 'Max Int32'), (-2147483648, 'Min Int32'), (0, 'Zero'), (1, 'One'), (NULL, 'Null');
SELECT entropy(num) AS entropy_num, COUNT(*) FROM boundary_values WHERE num IS NOT NULL AND str_value != '' GROUP BY str_value;
SELECT entropy(TOFloat64(num)) FROM boundary_values WHERE num IS NOT NULL AND num > 0 GROUP BY str_value HAVING entropy(num) > 0.0;
SELECT entropy(TOUInt32(value * 100)) AS entropy_scaled FROM complex_entropy WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND string_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY string_value HAVING entropy_scaled > 0.5;
